subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-09-13 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: These conflicts that people wage are like unto waves. Lo, one wave mounteth upon another, yet ultimately all these waves [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این محاربات که حضرات می کنند مثل امواج است.  مثلاً موجی میرود روی موج دیگر، ولی عاقبت همهٴ این امواج ها
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @material and spiritual existence; two books
